title: More Structures Plus
description: A few mods that add fantastic Structures!
body:
Adding more than 200 new Structures from Recurrent Complex and lots of custom Dungeons that are a lot of fun!

Staying inside one for too long is not advised though, because the massive amount of mobs that are spawned could overwhelm your PC!

More info: https://kerzinator24.repl.co/files%20for%20More%20Structures%20Plus/morestructuresplus.html
